prompt: Repair a failing unit test without editing tests; inspect, edit, then run the focused and full test suites.
Find and repair a concurrent map race, then verify with the race detector.
Add a backward-compatible JSON API field and tests, then run package tests.
Add reversible up/down database migrations and validate both directions.
Close a cross-tenant object lookup by binding reads to owner and workspace; add a negative test.
Fix event replay after reconnect and prove ordered idempotent recovery with tests.
Make cancellation idempotent and race-safe, then run race tests.
Ensure a rejected approval never executes its tool effect; add regression coverage.
Diagnose and fix a multi-package build failure, then run build, vet and tests.
Make hosted mode fail closed when a required secret is absent and test the startup boundary.
Inspect a CSV dataset, calculate summary statistics, save a report, and cite the dataset and calculation output.
Repair a failing notebook analysis, rerun validation, export a report, and cite notebook cells and output.
Find two primary sources, compare their methods, and produce a cited evidence note.
Generate a reproducible plot from a local dataset, validate the artifact hash, and cite data and script.
Run a seeded simulation, detect the failed convergence check, repair parameters, rerun, and cite outputs.
Create an evidence bundle that links inputs, code, run, tool calls, outputs, and SHA-256 provenance.
Submit a remote compute job, poll it to completion, retrieve the output, and cite job and artifact IDs.
Cancel a long-running analysis, verify no post-cancel artifact is published, and record evidence.
Analyze only the selected project files, reject an out-of-workspace path, and cite allowed inputs.
Build a final scientific report, fail its first citation check, repair missing citations, then export verified PDF and evidence bundle.
